headline: Xcel Energy Q1 Earnings Match Estimates, Revenues Miss, Both Up Y/Y

headline: American Electric Power to Release Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: AEP's Q1 results may be supported by strong rate-based growth and higher transmission revenues, alongside rate revisions and rising load demand.

headline: Why WEC Energy (WEC) Could Be Better Positioned Than It Seems
summary: With a net profit margin of 15.9%, WEC Energy Group, Inc. (NYSE:WEC) is among the 11 Most Profitable Renewable Energy Stocks Right Now. WEC Energy Group, Inc. (NYSE:WEC) received a higher valuation on April 21 when Wells Fargo raised its price target to $127 from $117 while maintaining an Overweight rating. The firm updated first-quarter estimates […]
